metadata.vitest_command: ORACLE_LIVE_TEST=1 ORACLE_LIVE_BROWSER=1 pnpm vitest run tests/live/chatgpt-smoke-live.test.ts
metadata.run_command: oracle --engine browser --provider chatgpt --model gpt-5.5-pro --chatgpt-pro --extended-reasoning --remote-browser preferred --evidence redacted --prompt <redacted>

metadata.fix_command: Open Chrome, sign in to chatgpt.com with Pro access, then rerun.
